article.headline: South Africa stun South Korea to reach World Cup knockouts for 1st time
article.description: South Africa advanced to the knockout phase of the World Cup for the first time with a 1-0 victory over South Korea on Wednesday.
article.linkText: S. Africa stun S. Korea, make 1st WC knockouts

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Presser (‘We answered those big mouths!’ - South Africa’s Broos hits back at critics) 2026/06/25 GLOBAL FIFA WORLD CUP

article.story:
GUADALUPE, Mexico -- South Africa advanced to the knockout phase of the World Cup for the first time with a 1-0 victory over South Korea on Wednesday.

Thapelo Maseko scored in the 63rd minute off a precise cross from Tshepang Moremi and South Africa finished in second place in Group A behind Mexico, who won all three of its group-stage games.

South Africa will take on Canada, the second-place finisher in Group B, in a knockout game Sunday at Inglewood, California. South Korea will now have to wait and hope that they advance as one of the eight best third-placed teams.

Bafana Bafana had failed to advance from the group stage in 1998, 2002 and as host in 2010.

South Africa opened their World Cup with a 2-0 loss to Mexico before using a late goal to earn a 1-1 draw with Czechia. They entered their final group-stage game trailing Mexico and favored South Korea before shocking the Taegeuk Warriors.

South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo made a shocking selection call by leaving captain Son Heung-Min out of his startling lineup. The LAFC star, who has at times singlehandedly carried South Korea's hopes for the past decade, was introduced as a substitute at halftime but couldn't help his side get the draw they needed to ensure a place in the knockout phase.

South Korea opened this World Cup with a 2-1 come-from-behind win over Czechia and lost to Mexico 1-0 in their second game.

South Korea became the first Asian team to reach the knockout rounds in 2002, when they finished fourth overall. The Taegeuk Warriors also advanced out of the group stage in 2022 and 2010, both times reaching the round of 16.

The Associated Press and ESPN's Gabriel Tan contributed to this report.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: totalContest

stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.
